rules.description: At least one lock attempt appears in payload.

rules.filter: tcp.port==5016 && (frame contains "BUSY" || frame contains "ERR_LOCKED" || frame contains "LOCK_DENIED")
rules.description: The competing lock is refused deterministically.
A save command is visible in the session.

rules.filter: tcp.port==5016 && (frame contains "DOC_UPDATE" || frame contains "UPDATED" || frame contains "VERSION")
rules.description: A post-save update or version marker is visible.
